title: Better Controller Experience
description: Makes the game easier to play when using controller.
body:
### **The console experience, on the Java platform** This modpack uses Controlify along with several QOL mods to make the game much easier to play when using a controller. It is engineered for a chiller experience. As we all know, controllers are not favorable when it comes to intense gameplay. They are far superior for a slow paced playstyle, somthing this pack mastered. It makes minecraft a more seamless experience, while at the same time adding **countless biomes** and spicing up the world generation. It is the **ultimate** vanilla overhaul for controller players. ![Modpack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c559950657e616baa8a53faad325e288e5a7dfa_0.webp) If you plan to play multiplayer, you must disable the mod 'CombatEdit'. If you do not disable it when playing multiplayer, you risk getting banned on whatever serve you play on. It is a client side modpack.
Mod List - Tectonic (world‑generation terrain shaping) — _tectonic-3.0.3-fabric-1.21.6.jar_ - CombatEdit (combat UI tweaks) — _combatedit-2.0.5+1.21.6.jar_ - Zoomify (infinite zoom utility) — _Zoomify-2.14.4+1.21.6.jar_ - TaxFreeLevels (XP level tax removal) — _TaxFreeLevels-1.4.10-fabric-1.21.5.jar_ - Sodium Extra (enhancement plugin for Sodium) — _sodium-extra-fabric-0.6.6+mc1.21.6.jar_ - Yet Another Config Lib v3 (YACL config framework) — _yet_another_config_lib_v3-3.7.1+1.21.6-fabric.jar_ -
